title: Hindi Popular Songs
catalogDescription: Discussion and analysis of popular songs from movies, folk, devotional, seasonal, and festival songs within their cultural context with attention to rhetoric and aesthetics. Recommended: ability to speak Hindi; and read and write in the Devanagari script.

title: Derivational Morphology of Hindi/Urdu
catalogDescription: A systematic introduction to the derivational morphology of Hindi/Urdu. Sanskrit, Persian, Arabic, and English elements in Hindi/Urdu. Treatment of derivational prefixes and suffixes, stem alternations, and methods of compound formation. Prerequisite: HINDI 203.

title: Survey of Modern Hindi Literature: Short Story (5) SSc/A&H
catalogDescription: Survey of Hindi literature from the late nineteenth century to the present. Readings from representative short stories situated in their socio-historical context and related to popular perception, a. o. Bollywood films. Prerequisite: HINDI 303 or instructor's permission.

title: Survey of Modern Hindi/Urdu Literature: Drama (5, max. 15) SSc/A&H
catalogDescription: Survey of Hindi-Urdu literature from the late nineteenth century to the present. Readings from representative dramas. The modern Hindi-Urdu theater that has developed in North India is important historically and, through its influence on the popular movies of Bollywood, forms an important part of contemporary popular culture of South Asia. Offered: jointly with URDU 424; W.
